settings.title: Enterprise World Top Training Provider for 15 Years Service!
settings.description: We are thrilled to announce that our company has been honoured as the Winner of Enterprise World Top Training Provider for an impressive 15 consecutive years! This prestigious accolade recognises our unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional training solutions and fostering professional growth across various industries.

settings.title: Business Frontier Leadership Conclave & Awards 2025
settings.description: Industry Leadership Award in Compliance and Quality AssuranceLocation: DubaiRecipient: Winner of the prestigious award recognising exceptional commitment to maintaining the highest standards of compliance and quality within the industry.Year: 2025

settings.title: Business Frontier Leadership Conclave & Awards 2025
settings.description: Career Calling International received the Mark of Excellence Award for the Asia Pacific region in Dubai in 2025. This honour acknowledges our significant work in education and training.

settings.title: CTODAY Awards 2025
settings.description: Recipient of the 2025 Most Outstanding Organisation in Education Compliance and Global Standards Award, presented by CToday, in recognition of our commitment to excellence and adherence to international educational standards.

settings.title: ILP Asia Pacific L&D Team Excellence Award 2024
settings.description: Proud to be a finalist in the prestigious ILP Asia Pacific L&D Team Excellence Award 2024, recognising our commitment to innovation and excellence in learning and development across the region.

settings.title: Forttuna Global Excellence Awards
settings.description: Business Leader of the Year Australia, an esteemed recognition from the Forttuna Global Excellence Awards, was awarded after being nominated and carefully selected by a distinguished jury. This honour was chosen from an impressive pool of half a million nominations, highlighting exceptional leadership and outstanding contributions to the business world.

settings.title: Online People Choice Awards 2011
settings.description: Proud winner of the Online People’s Choice Awards 2011 for excellence in compliance and quality assurance, recognising our dedication to delivering reliable and high-standard services.

settings.title: Enterprise World Recognition
settings.description: Top training RTO Resources, VET Resources, and RTO materials supplier, proudly recognised for providing high-quality and reliable CAQA resources from 2009 to 2024. With years of expertise, we are trusted by educators and training organisations nationwide for delivering comprehensive and up-to-date materials to support excellence in vocational education and training.
